title: Marketplace Manager - Flipkart Global Group - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Flipkart Global Group - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Flipkart Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Chandigarh operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Flipkart Global Group:
Flipkart Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Global Group!
